india_trends.title: Table Space adds 4.2 lakh sq ft in Maharashtra as GCC demand drives managed office boom
india_trends.summary: Table Space has significantly expanded its managed office space in Maharashtra. The company added 425,000 square feet across Pune and Navi Mumbai. This expansion boosts their regional presence to 2.6 million square feet. Pune locations include Wakad, Yerwada and Koregaon Park.

india_trends.title: Karnataka liquor taxation: Distillers to meet CM, seek review of new alcobev tax structure
india_trends.summary: Alcoholic beverage manufacturers in Bengaluru are seeking a review of proposed excise duty rules, fearing a European model's negative impact. india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy CESC and Trent on Tuesday for near term gains up to 9%
india_trends.summary: Nifty closed with slight gains after rebounding from intraday lows, driven by SBI and ICICI Bank. Analysts noted resistance near 24,500 and support at 24,270, while CESC and Trent showed bullish breakouts with strong momentum and volume expansion.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold slips $127/oz; silver falls $3/oz as US-Iran tensions revive inflation fears
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices fell on 20 April due to renewed tensions between the US and Iran. COMEX gold dropped to $4,808 and silver to $78.71, reversing previous gains. The US has escalated its military actions, raising inflation concerns and impacting precious metal investments.

india_trends.title: Hyundai, TVS sign joint development pact for commercialisation of electric 3-wheeler in India
india_trends.summary: Hyundai Motor and TVS Motor are joining forces. They will develop new electric three-wheelers for India. This partnership aims to improve last-mile transport. Hyundai will lead design and technology. TVS will bring its electric platform and local market knowledge. Local manufacturing will be a key f

india_trends.title: US Stocks: Marvell shares jump 5% on report of deal talks with Google to develop two AI chips
india_trends.summary: Marvell Technology's shares jumped nearly 5% on Monday following a report that Alphabet's Google is ​in talks with the chip designer ​to develop two new chips aimed at running AI models more ​efficiently.

india_trends.title: US stocks: Adobe shares rises after it launches AI suite for corporate clients as competition heats up
india_trends.summary: Adobe launched a suite of ​artificial intelligence tools ​on Monday to help corporate clients ​automate and personalize digital marketing functions, in a bid to fend off competition from autonomous tools ‌offered ⁠by startups ⁠such as Anthropic.

india_trends.title: West Asia crisis poses risks to India's trade and macroeconomic stability: NITI Aayog report
india_trends.summary: Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are impacting India's trade and economy. NITI Aayog reports these tensions widen the current account deficit and pressure the exchange rate. The India-Gulf Cooperation Council Free Trade Agreement is also slowed. Despite challenges, India's merchandise and services

india_trends.title: Health insurance coverage rises, higher in rural areas: Survey
india_trends.summary: Health insurance coverage in India has seen a major jump. Rural areas now have more people insured than urban centers. Government schemes are driving this growth. Out-of-pocket hospital expenses have also been reported. Morbidity levels have risen, with infections being the main reason for hospitali

india_trends.title: Core sector output fell 0.4% in March, lowest in 19 months
india_trends.summary: India’s core sector output contracted 0.4% year-on-year in March, marking its lowest level in 19 months, driven by a sharp decline in fertiliser production amid the West Asia conflict and weaker performance across energy-related industries, according to official data released on Monday.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq retreat as mounting U.S.-Iran tensions dampen sentiment
india_trends.summary: Wall Street indices eased from record highs as renewed U.S.-Iran tensions overshadowed a strong previous week. Oil prices jumped, boosting the energy sector, while tech stocks saw mixed performance. Investors now await quarterly earnings reports for insights into the economic impact of the conflict.

india_trends.title: RBI draft for upper layer non-banks affects CICs disproportionately, raises compliances costs
india_trends.summary: New Reserve Bank draft on upper layer non-bank finance companies disproportionately impacts core investment companies by increasing compliance costs. india_trends.title: Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on T&D stocks; 'Buy' on CG Power, GE Vernova T&D, Siemens Energy on capex boom
india_trends.summary: Motilal Oswal identifies opportunities in T&amp;D stocks driven by a rising demand for transformers and HVDC projects. The firm expects companies to benefit from increased capex and revenue growth, maintaining 'Buy' ratings for key players with ambitious price targets.

india_trends.title: Govt reviews rural schemes, supply chain woes to protect beneficiaries from Iran war impact
india_trends.summary: The Rural Development Ministry is reviewing its key schemes in response to the West Asia conflict's potential impact on global supply chains and prices.
